ocr_snippet: IMPRESSION: NO SIGNIFICANT ABNORMALITY DISCHARGE MEDICATION: TAB. NEUROKIND PLUS 1 TAB P/O OD X 20 DAYS TAB. FOLIC ACID 5 MG P/O OD X 20 DAYS ADVICE ON DISCHARGE: TAKE MEDICINE AS PRESCRIBED BY DOCTOR DIET: GREEN LEAFY VEGETABLES, NORMAL DIET NEXT FOLLOW UP: IN MEDICINE OPD ON WEDNESDAY/SOS WHEN YOU OBTAIN URGENT CARE: SOB / PAIN ABDOMEN / CHEST PAIN / GHABRAHAT
